description_long: This is a standard aluminum beverage can with a dark blue exterior and a metallic top. The can features the iconic Pepsi logo, which consists of a red, white, and blue circular emblem and the word 'pepsi' in lowercase letters beneath it. The logo is prominently displayed on one side, while the rest of the can is a deep blue color with no additional graphics or text. The top of the can is silver with a typical pull-tab opening mechanism. The can's surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light in a subtle manner. There are no visible dents, scratches, or signs of wear on the can.
description: A dark blue aluminum beverage can with a glossy finish, featuring the Pepsi logo and a silver pull-tab top.
description_view_0: The can is shown from the back, displaying a plain dark blue surface with no visible branding or text.
description_view_1: The can is rotated to reveal part of the Pepsi logo and a hint of the word 'pepsi' on the right side.
description_view_2: The front of the can is fully visible, showcasing the complete Pepsi logo and the word 'pepsi' in white.
description_view_3: The can is turned to show the left side of the logo, with most of the branding partially visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Pepsi logo in red, white, and blue with the word 'pepsi' in white lowercase letters on the front center of the can.
